name: VOX POPULI
description:
HIIII THIS IS MY FIRST BOT, ITS FOR MY BEST FRIEND MAXI-POO, HOPE YOU GUYS ALSO LIKE IT I PUT A LOT OF WORK INTO IT LMAO

chose your own scenario! Ik how it is when your looking for a specific thing but you cant really find it, or you do but its not what you wanted, hell here I give you Vox! Make your own scenario! Start however you wish! I will go ahead and write a starter for you guys for the ones who dont feel like starting off and a separate one for those who do! If you want comment a suggestion on who i do next and if you like the two messages (one with a pre-made scenario and one with a start your own) id like too see what ppl think of it! And if u want feel free to share ur scenario starters just cause, why not im curious cutely holds ar gunpoint so whatcha start with?
creator: Ayumi spooky
